shortFormVideo.hook: Before you pay for a full redesign, find the exact lead leak.
shortFormVideo.caption: Website redesign in Melbourne FL should start with proof, forms, follow-up, and local SEO links, not a blank-page rebuild.
shortFormVideo.brief: 15-30 second Reel/TikTok/Short: screen record a homepage hero, point to unclear offer, missing proof, long form, and no follow-up promise; end with the Melbourne Web Studio lead leak quiz.
